title: Candace Campbell Jackson transitions from SU chief of staff
summary: Candace Campbell Jackson is transitioning from her 11-year tenure as senior vice president and chief of staff at Syracuse University to a new role as senior advisor to Chancellor J. Michael Haynie. This leadership change at a major regional institution may have implications for Syracuse's business community and university-city partnerships.
processing_notes: Article concerns Syracuse University leadership, not City of Syracuse government operations
No direct municipal government impact identified
Relevant to CIO as business-community stakeholder mapping only
No budget, procurement, or policy implications for city detected
